description: In this talk, the speaker discusses the 'GREED Experiment' that arose during a period of excessive speculation in cryptocurrency, sharing insights and humorous anecdotes about the dynamics of the crypto market and social media engagement.
topic_summary: The speaker reflects on the impulsive nature of crypto investments during the 'shitcoin season' [t=56:99], recounting how a satirical tweet about greed unexpectedly led to a surge in engagement and followers [t=152:58].
